anti_claim: Batch10 cold eval honesty verifies one exact copied non-secret cold_eval.py body and its public fixture exercise only. It does not authorize live benchmarks, navigation truth, provider dispatch, live-agent results, private-root equivalence, publication, or release.

allowed_public_inputs: exact copied non-secret cold_eval.py macro body
source refs, digests, line counts, and required anchors
stable negative-case ids and validator verdicts

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A fixture scorecard inflated into benchmark truth, live navigation authority, live-agent result, provider dispatch, release approval, or a copied body without digest equality and negative cases.
failure_modes: source module digest drifts from cold_eval.py without a refreshed exact copy and manifest
copied source module lacks required anchors for scoring policy, task scoring, run_cold_eval, or expected-ref guards
validator accepts missing task fixtures or a flat route that can win the declared asymmetric exercise
validator accepts expected-ref injection or private fixture refs
receipts include copied body text, raw operator transcripts, private refs, provider payload bodies, credentials, or live agent state
capsule is treated as benchmark truth, navigation truth, source authority, provider dispatch, publication, release, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe exact-copy cold-eval capsule for one non-secret route-quality simulator body and a synthetic public workspace that exposes scorecard shape while preserving claim ceilings.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader inspect and rerun real cold-eval mechanics without granting benchmark, navigation, provider, live-agent, publication, release, source-mutation, or private-root authority.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly one copied macro source module
verify source-to-target digest equality and required anchors for the copied cold_eval.py module
execute the public cold-eval exercise without invoking live agents, providers, browser/HUD state, or source mutation
require stable negative-case codes for missing tasks, flat-route winners, expected-ref injection, and private fixture refs

keep benchmark win claims, navigation truth, live-agent result claims, provider dispatch, model dispatch, publication, release, private-root equivalence, source mutation, and whole-system correctness authority false
keep copied source bodies under source_modules only; receipts may expose refs, digests, anchors, counts, verdicts, and omission receipts but not body text

author.purpose: create a valid Batch 10 Cold Eval Honesty capsule instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Batch 10 Cold Eval Honesty capsule without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_batch10_cold_eval_honesty_capsule and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: Batch10 cold eval honesty verifies one exact copied non-secret cold_eval.py body and its public fixture exercise only. It does not authorize live benchmarks, navigation truth, provider dispatch, live-agent results, private-root equivalence, publication, or release.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, public_private_boundary, and anti-claim floor.
